goal_text: Task 01767: You want to find a restaurant in the east part of town and it should serve lebanese food. If there is no such venue how about chinese type of food. You want to know the address, phone number, and postcode of the venue.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
